title: ferrotorch-gpu: exp_f64_kernel PTX JIT compilation failed — surfaced by phase 2.5 (#767)
description: Phase 2.5 conformance probe surfaces 'PTX kernel compilation failed for exp_f64_kernel: DriverError(CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_PTX, a PTX JIT compilation failed)'. This is the same family as #781 (pow_f64) and the polynomial-cluster cascade — the exp_f64 PTX generated by ferrotorch-gpu doesn't validate against cudarc's JIT. Probe: dump the PTX, run nvcc/ptxas on it, identify whether it's a missing f64 lib intrinsic or an invalid instruction. Likely remediation matches the pow_f64 fix (#784) — inline a polynomial / bring a different rounding mode / fix the converter.
